block_04: Exciting news — we’ve added GlobePay as a new payment method to the IQ Option platform!
block_05: The new method allows making deposits and withdraw funds up to $100,000 in quick and convenient way.
block_07: Log in to your IQ Option account and open the Deposit section.
block_08: Choose the deposit amount and select GlobePay as your payment method.
block_09: Enter your GlobePay wallet credentials to confirm the payment.
block_10: Use GlobePay to withdraw profit — it’s just as easy!
block_12: We wish you a fantastic trading experience!👏
